instructions: This is a private-equity / private-credit distribution notice. Extract the fund-level fields and the four waterfall tiers. Return monetary amounts as plain numbers (no currency symbols, no thousands separators). Dates as written. currency is the 3-letter ISO code (default USD). distribution_type is one of: return_of_capital, income, realized_gain, tax, final, gp_carry.

descriptions.distribution_number: the distribution notice number (use 1 for a single/final distribution if unnumbered)
descriptions.distribution_type: one of return_of_capital, income, realized_gain, tax, final, gp_carry
descriptions.total_proceeds: total distributable proceeds in this notice (a single number)
descriptions.preferred_return: Tier 2 preferred / hurdle return AMOUNT in money - NOT a rate, percentage or MOIC multiple
descriptions.gp_catchup: Tier 3 GP catch-up AMOUNT in money
descriptions.residual_split: Tier 4 residual / carry split AMOUNT in money
descriptions.gp_carry_total: total carried interest AMOUNT paid to the GP
descriptions.num_limited_partners: count of LPs in the distribution schedule
